records.ety: [F. diter, or L. editus, p. p. of edere to give out, put forth, publish; e out + dare to give. See Date a point of time.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Edited; p. pr. & vb. n. Editing.]

defs: To superintend the publication of; to revise and prepare for publication; to select, correct, arrange, etc., the matter of, for publication; as, to edit a newspaper.
quotes: Philosophical treatises which have never been edited.
